headline: Skyward Specialty Q1 Earnings Beat on Apollo Lift, Premium Growth
summary: SKWD posts Q1 2026 EPS of $1.25 on 44.8% revenue growth, fueled by Apollo consolidation and strong premium gains across segments.

headline: Blue Owl Capital Q1 Earnings Miss on Lower Net Investment Income
summary: OBDC's Q1 earnings miss estimates as lower net investment income hurts results despite reduced expenses and a new $300M share repurchase plan.

raw.headline: Blue Owl Capital Q1 Earnings Miss on Lower Net Investment Income
raw.summary: OBDC's Q1 earnings miss estimates as lower net investment income hurts results despite reduced expenses and a new $300M share repurchase plan.

headline: The Hartford’s Study: Amid Rising Cost Of Living, AI Emerging As Benefits Decision-Making Tool For Gen Z
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., May 07, 2026--AI search tools are now a part of how of some U.S. workers are making employee benefits decisions, particularly as inflation is driving up the cost of living, according to the Future of Benefits Study from The Hartford, a leading provider of employee benefits and absence management.
